prompt: Create a striking vertical poster illustration of a young schoolgirl in profile walking toward the right, rendered almost entirely as a black silhouette against a saturated blood-red background. The character has a short bob haircut blown backward by wind, a bowed head, a sailor-style school uniform with a large scarf or neckerchief trailing behind, a flared pleated skirt, long sleeves, dark stockings, and chunky shoes. Use sharp cream-white highlights along the hair, face edge, collar, folds, knees, and shoe tips to define the silhouette. Composition: full-body side view centered slightly right, one leg forward and one leg back, skirt and scarf dramatically swept by wind. Add a tall vertical strip of distressed pseudo-Japanese typography on the far left, like unreadable early-AI kanji printed in pale gray-beige blocks; include exactly 7 stacked text blocks, each separated by horizontal bars, with glitchy malformed characters rather than legible text. Add two thin vertical gray border lines near the left and right edges, plus a black ground shadow and horizontal base line under the feet. Style: high-contrast anime noir, screenprint poster, limited palette of red, black, cream, and muted gray, rough ink edges, graphic negative space, dramatic backlighting, slightly vintage printed texture. No realistic background, no extra characters, no readable modern text, no watermark.
